People

<div class="col-sm-4 clearfix" style="text-align: center; ">
	<div style="display: flex; justify-content: center;">
		<div class="image-cropper">
			<img class="person-pic" src="https://elenagsierra.github.io/coley_to_beery/images/teampic/SaraBeery.jpg" alt="Sara Beery photo"/>
		</div>
	</div>
	<h4><b>Sara Beery</b></h4>
	<i>Assistant Professor</i> <br>
    <a href="https://beerys.github.io"><i class="mdi mdi-web"></i></a>
    <a href="https://twitter.com/sarameghanbeery"><i class="mdi mdi-twitter"></i></a>
    <a href="https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=Hbr4c10AAAAJ"><i class="mdi mdi-school"></i></a>
	<p>Sara is an assistant professor at MIT EECS' Faculty of AI and Decision Making and CSAIL, and was previously a visiting researcher at Google working on Auto Arborist. She has always loved the natural world, and has seen a growing need for technology-based approaches to conservation and sustainability challenges. Her research focuses on building computer vision methods that enable global-scale environmental and biodiversity monitoring across data modalities, tackling real-world challenges including strong spatiotemporal correlations that lead to domain shift, imperfect data quality, fine-grained categories, and long-tailed distributions.</p>
</div>


<div class="col-sm-4 clearfix" style="text-align: center; ">
	<div style="display: flex; justify-content: center;">
		<div class="image-cropper">
			<img class="person-pic" src="https://elenagsierra.github.io/coley_to_beery/images/teampic/Lauren.jpg" alt="Lauren Gillespie photo"/>
		</div>
	</div>
	<h4><b>Lauren Gillespie</b></h4>
	<i>Postdoc <br> </i>
    <a href="https://gillespl.com/"><i class="mdi mdi-web"></i></a>
    <a href="https://x.com/leg2015"><i class="mdi mdi-twitter"></i></a>
    
    <a href="https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=zrVz47MAAAAJ&hl=en"><i class="mdi mdi-school"></i></a>
    
    
	<p>Lauren is an MIT METEOR postdoctoral associate advised by Profs. Sara Beery and Sherrie Wang (LIDS + MechE).  She will be joining the University of Michigan's School for Environment and Sustainability in Fall of 2026.  Her research focuses on developing AI-integrated approaches for monitoring ecosystems at scale.

</p> </div>

</div>
<div class="row">


<div class="col-sm-4 clearfix" style="text-align: center; ">
	<div style="display: flex; justify-content: center;">
		<div class="image-cropper">
			<img class="person-pic" src="https://elenagsierra.github.io/coley_to_beery/images/teampic/Shir.jpg" alt="Shir Bar photo"/>
		</div>
	</div>
	<h4><b>Shir Bar</b></h4>
	<i>Postdoc <br> </i>
    <a href="https://shir3bar.github.io"><i class="mdi mdi-web"></i></a>
    
    <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/shir-bar/"><i class="mdi mdi-linkedin"></i></a>
    <a href="https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=HlpcLSsAAAAJ"><i class="mdi mdi-school"></i></a>
    
    
	<p>Shir is a postdoctoral fellow supported by the VATAT Marine Sciences Fellowship.  She works at the interface of AI and ecology, studying how expert knowledge can be used more efficiently to build ecological datasets,  especially for rare and hard-to-observe phenomena.

</p> </div>

<div class="col-sm-4 clearfix" style="text-align: center; ">
	<div style="display: flex; justify-content: center;">
		<div class="image-cropper">
			<img class="person-pic" src="https://elenagsierra.github.io/coley_to_beery/images/teampic/Lukas.jpg" alt="Lukas Picek photo"/>
		</div>
	</div>
	<h4><b>Lukas Picek</b></h4>
	<i>Postdoc <br> </i>
    <a href="https://picekl.github.io/research-web/"><i class="mdi mdi-web"></i></a>
    
    <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/"><i class="mdi mdi-linkedin"></i></a>
    <a href="https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=SBifPtYAAAAJ&hl=cs&oi=ao"><i class="mdi mdi-school"></i></a>
    
    
	<p>Lukas is a Fulbright Visiting Scholar at MIT CSAIL.  He build computer vision and machine learning systems for biodiversity monitoring,  individual identification of animals, species recognition, species distribution modeling and other  real-world problems where reliable AI has to work alongside domain experts.</p>
</div>





<div class="col-sm-4 clearfix" style="text-align: center; ">
	<div style="display: flex; justify-content: center;">
		<div class="image-cropper">
			<img class="person-pic" src="https://elenagsierra.github.io/coley_to_beery/images/teampic/Timm.jpg" alt="Timm Haucke photo"/>
		</div>
	</div>
	<h4><b>Timm Haucke</b></h4>
	<i>PhD Student <br> </i>
    <a href="https://timm.haucke.xyz"><i class="mdi mdi-web"></i></a>
    <a href="https://twitter.com/timmhaucke"><i class="mdi mdi-twitter"></i></a>
    
    <a href="https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=AtT9n5MAAAAJ"><i class="mdi mdi-school"></i></a>
    
    
	<p>Timm is a PhD student at MIT CSAIL and advised by Sara Beery. He is interested in multi-modal environmental  and biodiversity monitoring, as well as 3D reconstruction of natural scenes to enable better animal  population density estimation.

</p> </div>

</div>
<div class="row">


<div class="col-sm-4 clearfix" style="text-align: center; ">
	<div style="display: flex; justify-content: center;">
		<div class="image-cropper">
			<img class="person-pic" src="https://elenagsierra.github.io/coley_to_beery/images/teampic/Julia.jpg" alt="Julia Chae photo"/>
		</div>
	</div>
	<h4><b>Julia Chae</b></h4>
	<i>PhD Student <br> </i>
    <a href="https://juliachae.github.io"><i class="mdi mdi-web"></i></a>
    <a href="https://twitter.com/juliachae_"><i class="mdi mdi-twitter"></i></a>
    
    <a href="https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=U16kRHoAAAAJ"><i class="mdi mdi-school"></i></a>
    
    
	<p>Julia is an EECS PhD student at MIT CSAIL advised by Sara Beery and generously supported by the MIT  Andrew and Erna Viterbi Graduate Fellowship. Her current project focuses on investigating how synthetic  data can be used to enhance real-world vision models.

</p> </div>

<div class="col-sm-4 clearfix" style="text-align: center; ">
	<div style="display: flex; justify-content: center;">
		<div class="image-cropper">
			<img class="person-pic" src="https://elenagsierra.github.io/coley_to_beery/images/teampic/Neha.jpg" alt="Neha Hulkund photo"/>
		</div>
	</div>
	<h4><b>Neha Hulkund</b></h4>
	<i>PhD Student <br> </i>
    <a href="https://hulkund.github.io"><i class="mdi mdi-web"></i></a>
    <a href="https://twitter.com/NHulkund"><i class="mdi mdi-twitter"></i></a>
    
    <a href="https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=MzRVTNoAAAAJ"><i class="mdi mdi-school"></i></a>
    
    
	<p>Neha is a PhD student at MIT CSAIL, advised by Prof. Sara Beery and supported by the MIT Jameel Clinic  Fellowship and the NSF GRFP. She is interested in building reliable machine learning systems,  balancing tradeoffs of performance, efficiency, privacy, and robustness.

</p> </div>

<div class="col-sm-4 clearfix" style="text-align: center; ">
	<div style="display: flex; justify-content: center;">
		<div class="image-cropper">
			<img class="person-pic" src="https://elenagsierra.github.io/coley_to_beery/images/teampic/Justin.jpg" alt="Justin Kay photo"/>
		</div>
	</div>
	<h4><b>Justin Kay</b></h4>
	<i>PhD Student <br> </i>
    <a href="https://justinkay.github.io"><i class="mdi mdi-web"></i></a>
    <a href="https://twitter.com/__justinkay"><i class="mdi mdi-twitter"></i></a>
    
    <a href="https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=Qurq7foAAAAJ"><i class="mdi mdi-school"></i></a>
    
    
	<p>Justin is a PhD student at MIT, advised by Sara Beery and supported by fellowships from MIT EECS and NSF.  His research focuses on making computer vision and machine learning systems more deployable and informative  for science and decision-making, particularly for environmental and climate applications.

</p> </div>

</div>
<div class="row">


<div class="col-sm-4 clearfix" style="text-align: center; ">
	<div style="display: flex; justify-content: center;">
		<div class="image-cropper">
			<img class="person-pic" src="https://elenagsierra.github.io/coley_to_beery/images/teampic/Rupa.png" alt="Rupa Kurinchi-Vendhan photo"/>
		</div>
	</div>
	<h4><b>Rupa Kurinchi-Vendhan</b></h4>
	<i>PhD Student <br> </i>
    <a href="https://rupakv.com"><i class="mdi mdi-web"></i></a>
    <a href="https://twitter.com/RupaVendhan"><i class="mdi mdi-twitter"></i></a>
    
    <a href="https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=YY9cf7sAAAAJ"><i class="mdi mdi-school"></i></a>
    
    
	<p>Rupa is a PhD student at MIT CSAIL, advised by Prof. Sara Beery and supported by the MIT Tina Chan Fellowship.  Primarily, her research focuses on robust computer vision with remote sensing data and aerial imagery in  order to address climate issues such as conservation and biodiversity monitoring.

</p> </div>

<div class="col-sm-4 clearfix" style="text-align: center; ">
	<div style="display: flex; justify-content: center;">
		<div class="image-cropper">
			<img class="person-pic" src="https://elenagsierra.github.io/coley_to_beery/images/teampic/Elena.jpg" alt="Elena Sierra photo"/>
		</div>
	</div>
	<h4><b>Elena Sierra</b></h4>
	<i>PhD Student <br> </i>
    <a href="https://elenagsierra.github.io/"><i class="mdi mdi-web"></i></a>
    
    <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/elenagsierra/"><i class="mdi mdi-linkedin"></i></a>
    <a href="https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=lbsq3E4AAAAJ&hl=en"><i class="mdi mdi-school"></i></a>
    
    
	<p>Elena is an EECS PhD student at MIT advised by Sara Beery & Sherrie Wang and supported by the GEM Fellowship.  Her research focuses on designing machine learning systems that make imperfect ecological data actionable,  drawing on domain-specific knowledge to turn flawed data into reliable, decision-ready insight.

</p> </div>

<div class="col-sm-4 clearfix" style="text-align: center; ">
	<div style="display: flex; justify-content: center;">
		<div class="image-cropper">
			<img class="person-pic" src="https://elenagsierra.github.io/coley_to_beery/images/teampic/Antoine.jpg" alt="Antoine Salaün photo"/>
		</div>
	</div>
	<h4><b>Antoine Salaün</b></h4>
	<i>PhD Student <br> </i>
    <a href="https://www.antoinesalaun.com/"><i class="mdi mdi-web"></i></a>
    
    
    
    <a href="https://www.youtube.com/@AntoinevsScience"><i class="mdi mdi-youtube"></i></a>
    
	<p>Antoine is an EECS PhD student at MIT CSAIL advised by Sara Beery and generously supported by the MIT  Siddartha Banerjee Fellowship. His current project focuses on integrating ecological expertise in  re-identification models for elephants through interpretable and editable architectures.</p>
</div>



</div>
